  children={"Retry a failed or cancelled task"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/tasks/{taskId}/retry"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Re-queues a failed or cancelled task with the same parameters.
